codes.name: N+1 query under lazy relation access
codes.explanation: A fix iterates a queryset and touches a related object inside the loop without select_related/prefetch_related, turning one query into one-per-row. Tests that assert row content still pass, so the regression is invisible without query-count assertions.

codes.name: Migration state diverges from model state
codes.explanation: A model field is edited but no migration is generated, or the migration is hand-edited to disagree with the model. makemigrations --check would catch it; a patch that only runs the unit suite will not.
codes.example: AddField left out of 0042_auto.py after adding `slug = SlugField()`.

codes.name: Transaction boundary swallowed by atomic()
codes.explanation: Wrapping a block in transaction.atomic() while catching IntegrityError inside the same block leaves the connection in a broken-transaction state; subsequent queries raise 'current transaction is aborted'.
